# FallRisks / Mindful Guardian

> Home fall risk assessment for families. Room-by-room safety checks, emergency contacts, smart home monitoring, and care team coordination.

## What we do
FallRisks provides proactive fall prevention through room-by-room home safety assessments, medication safety guides, vitality profiles, and family care coordination. Connected to the co-op.care ecosystem for companion care and HSA/FSA eligibility.

## Links
- Website: https://fallrisks.com
- co-op.care: https://co-op.care
- Fall prevention: https://fallprevention.help
